name: Meow Time Machine: VAN GOGH
short_description: This is an immersive hidden object puzzle game that takes you through time and space to explore the tumultuous artistic life of Post-Impressionist master Vincent van Gogh.
detailed_description:
Soul in Colors: Van Gogh's Art World

This is an immersive hidden object puzzle game that takes you through time and space to explore the tumultuous artistic life of Post-Impressionist master Vincent van Gogh. From the Yellow House in Arles to the Saint-Rémy monastery under starry nights, from sunflower fields to the final wheat fields, each step is a deep exploration of an artistic soul.

Artistic Journey

Embark on a spiritual journey through five chapters, from Van Gogh's first stunning impressions upon arriving in Arles, to the golden inspiration of sunflowers, from dreamy creations under starry skies to inner peace at the asylum, and finally to farewell at the wheat fields of Auvers. In each carefully designed scene, you will collect items intimately connected to Van Gogh's life, piecing together the spiritual puzzle of an artistic genius.

Unique Gaming Experience

Beautifully Painted Scenes: Reinterpreting Van Gogh's life stages in Post-Impressionist style
Delicate Emotional Exploration: Feel the artist's inner waves under the Provence sunshine, the brilliant starry nights, and before the iron windows of the asylum
Interesting Tasks: Join "Star", the cat companion in Van Gogh's life, to collect scattered special items and uncover hidden stories
Art History Exploration: Discover the charm and development of Post-Impressionist art in the game, and feel Van Gogh's profound influence on modern art

Game Features

  • Five carefully designed chapters, each telling a key stage in Van Gogh's life

  • More than 20 unique scenes, from the train station in Arles to the golden wheat fields of Auvers

  • Dozens of key collectible items, including painting tools, pigments, and precious objects from Van Gogh's life

  • Side quests brought by Star the cat

  • Immersive puzzle-solving that blends art history knowledge with emotional experience

Game Instructions

This is a small hidden object puzzle game with five chapters and a total gameplay time of approximately 1-2 hours.
Click on the left and right sides of the book to turn pages

The last page of the book has multilingual settings
Press esc to exit the game
The overall difficulty of the game is not high; the light bulb hint in the upper right corner of the screen indicates that there are hidden objects you need in the current scene

Hints can also be turned off in the settings. Please note that turning off hints significantly increases the difficulty

supported_languages: English, French, German, Russian, Turkish, Japanese, Swedish, Simplified Chinese, Finnish, Portuguese - Portugal, Spanish - Latin America, Arabic, Korean
